_doc: CitiBike system-wide per-trip crash risk by time of day. Recomputed from the owner's AXA/DSC project (notebooks/risk_analysis.ipynb): NYPD collision severity (hazard H) and CitiBike departures (exposure E) aggregated over 2025 trips, risk = H / E, EB-smoothed (lambda ~ 1 at this aggregate exposure, so R_eb ~ R_raw). x_daytime = R / min(R). The exposure normalization inverts the ranking: most crash severity is at midday, but per-trip risk peaks at night.
